title: Final Spaghetti II - Part 1
description:
Here it is.. The thing you've all been waiting for: Final Spaghetti II!

After a lot of delays and technical problems, i can finally upload this video. Actually, i think that it's many times more epic than the first one. :D

Anyways.. I hope that you'll enjoy the sequel to Final Spaghetti.. :D

Enjoy!
